reviews.comment:
Buenas!
Acompañé a mi hermana a cambiar unas lucecitas del auto...
Tanto el sr. d seguridad,.como el personal d playa q colaboró con el cambio, fueron muuuy amables!!¡
Yyyy el valor del trámite, accesible, en estos tiempos "d dinero q se va volandooo"!!

Muchas graciasss!!!

(Translated by Google)
Hello!
I went with my sister to change some headlights on her car...
Both the security guard and the beach staff who helped with the change were very kind!!
And the cost of the procedure was affordable, in these times of "money that flies by the seatbelt"!!

Thank you so much!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3398041021459195715/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNU9ibV9nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar de encuentro de automovilistas que hacen una parada y con excelentes baños a disposición. Falta máquina de agua caliente gratis y estarían completos. Buena atención de su personal.

(Translated by Google)
A meeting place for motorists stopping by, with excellent restrooms. The free hot water machine is missing, and they'd be full. The staff is attentive.
